mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payment_instruction ( payment_instruction_id, idempotency_key, sender_user_id, sender_account_id, auth_token_id, original_payment_id, transaction_no, sender_account_no_snap, sender_account_alias_snap, receiver_bank_code, receiver_account_no, receiver_holder_name_snap, holder_inquiry_at, is_intra_bank, routing_network_type, transfer_amount, fee_amount, receiver_passbook_sender_display, receiver_memo, sender_memo, status, failure_category, channel, requested_at, completed_at, business_date, next_retry_at, next_timeout_at, version, trigger_source, is_scheduled, scheduled_execution_at, first_registrant_id, last_modifier_id ) VALUES ( #{paymentInstructionId}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{senderUserId}, #{senderAccountId}, #{authTokenId}, #{originalPaymentId}, #{transactionNo}, #{senderAccountNoSnap}, #{senderAccountAliasSnap}, #{receiverBankCode}, #{receiverAccountNo}, #{receiverHolderNameSnap}, #{holderInquiryAt}, #{isIntraBank}, #{routingNetworkType}, #{transferAmount}, #{feeAmount}, #{receiverPassbookSenderDisplay}, #{receiverMemo}, #{senderMemo}, #{status}, #{failureCategory}, #{channel}, #{requestedAt}, #{completedAt}, #{businessDate}, #{nextRetryAt}, #{nextTimeoutAt}, #{version}, #{triggerSource}, #{isScheduled}, #{scheduledExecutionAt}, #{firstRegistrantId}, #{lastModifierId} )
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_instruction SET status = #{status}, completed_at = #{completedAt}, failure_category = #{failureCategory}, next_retry_at = NULL, next_timeout_at = NULL, version = version + 1, last_modified_at = now() WHERE payment_instruction_id = #{paymentInstructionId} AND version = #{version}
UPDATE payment_instruction SET next_timeout_at = #{nextTimeoutAt}, last_modified_at = now() WHERE payment_instruction_id = #{piId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM payment_instruction WHERE next_timeout_at IS NOT NULL AND next_timeout_at < now() AND status = 'CLEARING' ORDER BY next_timeout_at ASC LIMIT 50
mapper.update: UPDATE payment_instruction SET receiver_holder_name_snap = #{receiverHolderNameSnap}, holder_inquiry_at = #{holderInquiryAt}, last_modified_at = now() WHERE payment_instruction_id = #{paymentInstructionId}
